name: /audit-pack: bundles the audit log + provenance manifests sections (C-4 + C-3 / §2.8)
command: mkdir -p compliance .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"event":"commit-signed","sha":"abc123"}\n' > compliance/audit.jsonl && printf '{"commit":"abc123","timestamp":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z","ai_involvement":{"tier":1}}' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --audit-log "$PWD/compliance/audit.jsonl" --provenance-dir "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section audit-log,provenance && grep "commit-signed" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "abc123" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
